title: What's New With VISs | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
offers the latest information about vaccine information statements (VISs) currently under development or newly released.
2025 
Get email updates Sign up for our email newsletter below.
May 29, 2025 
Updated Pneumococcal Conjugate (PCV) and Pneumococcal Polysaccharide (PPSV23) VISs Now Available 
Updated VISs for PCV and PPSV23 vaccines have been posted. We encourage providers to begin using these VISs immediately, but stocks of previous editions may be used until exhausted.
January 31, 2025 
Updated VISs Now Available 
Updated VISs for COVID-19 , dengue , hepatitis A , hepatitis B , live attenuated influenza , inactivated influenza , MMR , MMRV , meningococcal ACWY , meningococcal B , polio , respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) , Tdap (tetanus, diphtheria, and pertussis) , varicella , cholera , Ebola , and smallpox/monkeypox vaccines have been posted. Providers are encouraged to begin using these updated VISs immediately.
2024 
October 17, 2024 
Updated COVID-19, Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV), and Cholera Vaccine VISs Now Available 
Updated Vaccine Information Statements for COVID-19 vaccine, RSV vaccine, and Cholera vaccine have been posted. We encourage providers to begin using these VISs immediately, but stocks of previous editions may be used until exhausted.
2023 
December 7, 2023 
New Tick-borne Encephalitis (TBE) Vaccine VIS Now Available
